description: Cross-language conformance for the SH4 live/audio source additions: the Epg ResourceKind, the Iptv SourceKind, and the typed EpgWindow [startUnix, endUnix) request shape (Unix seconds, half-open). Wire names are snake_case for the kinds; EpgWindow uses camelCase startUnix/endUnix. A request without an EPG window serializes WITHOUT the epgWindow key (skip-default), so existing request vectors stay byte-identical. window.contains / window.overlaps are the pure helpers later live-TV chunks use to clamp a listing.
